role: Contains CI/CD workflow definitions for automated testing, documentation deployment, release management, and architecture compliance checks.
responsibility: Collectively, these workflows ensure code quality through linting, testing, and building across Node.js versions; automate documentation deployment to GitHub Pages; manage automated releases and npm publishing via version tags; provide a template for architecture compliance checks on pull requests using `spine sync` and `spine check`; and handle stale issue and pull request triage with configurable thresholds and labels.

children.role: CI/CD workflow configuration for automated documentation deployment
CI/CD workflow for automated release and npm publishing
CI/CD integration template for automated architecture compliance checks on pull requests
Documentation of the automated stale issue and pull request triage workflow for the ArchSpine repository.
